subject: feat(pdf): add "Save as PDF" button to pricing and structuring calculators
body:
Both calculator pages now have a "Save as PDF" button that triggers
window.print(), leveraging existing @media print CSS for clean output.
Buttons auto-hide during print preview via the no-print class.

Tags: pdf, ui, feature, pricing, structuring
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: pdf-download
Semver: minor
